## Checklist

- [ ] The change matches the related issue scope.
- [ ] Static export compatibility is preserved.
- [ ] No API routes, Server Actions, runtime SSR, or request-time server features were added.
- [ ] AWS credentials, secrets, Terraform state, and local `.tfvars` files are not committed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior, architecture, or deployment changed.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
